titleStmt.title: SII 31.190: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 190. (A.R. No. B 264 of 1936.) PEDDACHINTAKUNṬA, SIRUVEL TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: A broken slab lying in the compoud of the Sāmbaśivēśvara temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1364, Durmati, Pushya, śu. 15, Monday, lunar eclipse. The lunar eclipse falls on Wednesday. Hence the date of corresponds to 27, Wednesday, 1441, A.D. f.d.t. °92.

Records the confirmation of renewal of gift of lands to the eight temples such as one kha or vṛiṭṭi to the god Rāmayadēva, one kha or vṛiṭṭi to the god Gōpināthadēva, probably one kha (kha 011) to Mayilaradēva, kha (kha 011) to Vināyaka, kha 01 to goddess Chāvunḍēśvari, Gamgala vṛitti and 0� kha to Pōturāju (village god) and one vṛitti to Sōmayadēva alongwith the taxes namely āyam, pamgam, kānika and Darisana for the merit of his parents by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, mīsaragamḍa Kaṭāri Sāḷuva Kampayyadēva mahārāja, son of Avubhalayadēva mahārāja and Ōbāyama.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
[Ōṁnamaśi] vāyaḥ svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śa
ka varuṣaṁbulu 1364 Agunēṁṭi
du¨rmati saṁvatsara puṣya śu 15 sō catu¨rdaśa bhu
vanādhīśvarulaIna śrīciṁtakuṁṭadēvaraśrī
gōpīnādhadēvaralayokka divyaśrīpā kuṁ
nugrāma daḷavāyilakuṁnu nija śrīmaṁ
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mīsaragaṁḍa kaṭāri laṁ
gaṁpayyadēvamahārājulaku ma(mā)
kunu ga¨rbharatnākarulaina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara Avubha
ḷayadēvamahārājulakuṁnu vōbāyaṁmmakuṁnu su
putruḍaina śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mīsaragaṁḍa kaṭāri sā
ḷuva kaṁpayyadēva mahārājulu sāṣṭāṁga daṁṇaṁpeṭi sama
¨rpiṁcina dha¨rmmaśāsanaṁ pū¨rvvāna dēvasdānālaku jelivrittulu
rāmayadēvara vritti kha 2 nni gōpinātha dēvaravritti kha 1 nnimayi
lāra dēvaravrittikha 0 . nnu vināyakadēvara vrittikha 0 . nnu cavuḍḍēṁśvari
vrittikha 0 . nnu gaṁgala vrittikha 0 . pōtularāju kha 0 . nnu sōmāya
dēvaravritti 1 nnu veraśi dēvastānālu 8 ki cēnu nālugu
vuṭlunu paṁdumu dumucēnikinni śrōtriyaṁ [E]
ra Āyaṁ paṁgaṁ kānika dariśana Aṁta vaṭuṁnu bhaḷayya
kuṁnnu vōbāyammagārikiṁnni sugutaṁ gānu sōmagrahaṇa
puṁṇyakālamaṁdu sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu thāravōstimigāna
Ācaṁdrā¨rkasdāyigānu cellaṁgaladi .
talaṁcinānu
brahmāhatyanu
paṁcamahā
dattaṁvā va¨rṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 31.190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
